item.title: Wawa Beverage Company: Wawa Iced Tea Lemon 16 oz Pint, Plastic bottle Recall
item.product: Wawa Iced Tea Lemon 16 oz Pint, Plastic bottle
item.summary: Undeclared Milk Allergen, Product details: Wawa Iced Tea Lemon 16 oz Pint, Plastic bottle
item.affectedPeople: The product has been distributed to the following states: DE, MD, NJ, PA, VA
item.remedy: Affected quantity: Wawa Iced Tea Lemon Pint (16oz) - 15,510
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
